title: Saudi-Style Smoked Yam
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from Saudi cuisine, featuring smoky yam as the main ingredient. Perfect for a dinner or lunch option.
instructions: Wash and peel the yams, then cut them into 1-inch cubes.
In a large bowl, mix together smoky sauce, white sauce, and grill seasoning.
Add the yam cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the sauce mixture.
Grill the yams for 20-25 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are tender and slightly charred.
Serve the yams with fluffy rice.
